commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `system` plugin origin discovered from machine-wide plugin directories, bypasses normal activation controls, grants implicit hook permissions, floors hook priority, and adds related tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection is enough to reproduce the blockers: current discovery skips Windows permission checks, hook execution sorts by raw numeric priority, and duplicate precedence does not handle the new origin.
commands.review_followup: This draft PR changes the OpenClaw trust model by adding privileged in-process code execution, so maintainer security/product approval is needed before any repair lane should continue.
